description: ASP.NET Core application monitoring via Prometheus metrics. Covers HTTP request rates, latency percentiles, error rates, Kestrel connections, .NET runtime GC, thread pool, and process-level resource usage.
title: ASP.NET Core (Prometheus)

var_job.description: Prometheus job label for the ASP.NET Core application
var_job.name: job

widgets.description: Total HTTP requests per second across all routes and status codes
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Fraction of HTTP responses with 5xx status codes
widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: HTTP request rate broken down by route and method
widgets.title: Request Rate by Route

widgets.description: HTTP request latency percentiles (p50, p90, p95, p99) over time
widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: HTTP response count grouped by status code class
widgets.title: Requests by Status Code Class

widgets.description: p50, p95, p99 latency broken down by route
widgets.title: Latency by Route (p50 / p99)

widgets.description: Number of currently active Kestrel connections
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Number of connections waiting in the Kestrel accept queue
widgets.title: Queued Connections

widgets.description: Rate of connections rejected by Kestrel (connection limit exceeded)
widgets.title: Rejected Connections/s

widgets.description: p50 and p99 Kestrel connection duration
widgets.title: Connection Duration (p50 / p99)

widgets.description: Garbage collection frequency by generation (gen0, gen1, gen2)
widgets.title: GC Collections/s by Generation

widgets.description: Total managed heap memory allocated to the .NET runtime
widgets.title: Managed Heap Size

widgets.description: Number of items queued to the thread pool waiting to be processed
widgets.title: Thread Pool Queue Depth

widgets.description: Number of active thread pool threads vs number of completed work items
widgets.title: Thread Pool Threads & Completed Items

widgets.description: CPU utilisation of the ASP.NET Core process (all cores combined)
widgets.title: Process CPU Usage

widgets.description: Process working set (RSS) and private memory usage over time
widgets.title: Process Memory Usage
